arguments.content:
# Sprint 8 Week 1 Review — Presentation Outline

**Date:** Friday, March 27, 2026  
**Time:** 14:00–15:30 CST  
**Sprint:** Sprint 8, Week 1 (2026-03-23 to 2026-03-27)  
**Venue:** Conference Room B / Zoom

---

## Agenda

| Time | Duration | Item |
|------|----------|------|
| 14:00–14:05 | 5 min | Opening & Sprint Goals Recap |
| 14:05–14:25 | 20 min | Team Member Presentations |
| 14:25–14:40 | 15 min | Key Metrics & Demo |
| 14:40–15:10 | 30 min | Blockers Discussion & Resolution |
| 15:10–15:25 | 15 min | Sprint 8 Week 2 Preview |
| 15:25–15:30 | 5 min | Closing & Action Items |

---

## Team Member Presentation Modules

### 1. Alex Zhang — Backend Tech Lead
- **Duration:** 5 minutes
- **Topics:**
  - Sprint 8 Week 1 backend deliverables summary
  - Architecture decisions and API updates
  - Cross-team coordination highlights
- **Materials:** `20260327_sprint8_week1_review.json`

### 2. Bai — Backend Engineer
- **Duration:** 5 minutes
- **Topics:**
  - CI/CD pipeline improvements
  - Test coverage achievements
  - Backend performance metrics
- **Materials:** CI build report, test coverage analysis

### 3. Chen — Frontend Engineer
- **Duration:** 5 minutes
- **Topics:**
  - UI/UX enhancements delivered this week
  - API integration updates
  - Frontend stability metrics
- **Materials:** API request trends, user activity report

### 4. Dana — QA Engineer
- **Duration:** 5 minutes
- **Topics:**
  - Testing milestones and bug resolution
  - Risk assessment updates
  - Quality gates for Week 2
- **Materials:** Risk assessment, error event summary

---

## Q&A Time Slots

| Session | Time | Duration | Focus Area |
|---------|------|----------|------------|
| **Q&A 1** | 14:25–14:30 | 5 min | Post-presentation clarifications |
| **Q&A 2** | 14:50–15:05 | 15 min | Blockers and impediments discussion |
| **Q&A 3** | 15:20–15:25 | 5 min | Week 2 planning questions |

---

## Attendees

- **Core Team:** Alex Zhang, Bai, Chen, Dana
- **Stakeholders:** Product Manager, Engineering Manager
- **Optional:** DevOps Lead, UX Designer

---

## Pre-Meeting Checklist

- [ ] All presentation materials uploaded to shared drive
- [ ] Demo environment verified and accessible
- [ ] Metrics dashboards updated
- [ ] Remote attendees sent Zoom link
- [ ] Action items from previous review closed

---

*Generated for Sprint 8 Week 1 Review — 2026-03-27*
